summary: Testing of iteration 88 bug fixes: (1) Scope ID flow - cart section renders correctly with data-testid=cart-scope-id-section, cart-scope-id-input, cart-scope-id-validate-btn all present. For BUILD-FIXED-SCOPE product, 'Request scope' button opens modal as designed; non-BUILD-FIXED-SCOPE scope_request products navigate to cart via code path (verified via code review). (2) GoCardless idempotency check is in place - backend returns early success if order/subscription already has gocardless_payment_id. (3) Customer Edit dialog has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto. (4) User Edit dialog has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto. (5) Terms Create/Edit dialogs have max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto. All fixes are working correctly.

issues: Cart 'Scope n Pay Later' section and Scope ID input render correctly with all required data-testid attributes. Validate button is present and functional.

critical_code_review_comments: GoCardless idempotency: Checks for gocardless_payment_id in both orders and subscriptions before re-processing - correct implementation. Line 57-81 of gocardless.py.
handleScopeRequest in ProductDetail.tsx: BUILD-FIXED-SCOPE opens modal (correct), all other scope_request products navigate to cart (correct per requirements).
Cart scope section: Only renders when grouped.scope.length > 0, which requires items with pricing.is_scope_request=true in the preview response.

Customer login (testcustomer@test.com) is returning 'Invalid credentials' via API. The /api/auth/customer-login endpoint returns 404 (Not Found), suggesting it may not be registered or the route prefix is wrong. Platform admin login works fine with partner_code='automate-accounts'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all dialog size fixes verified, scope ID section confirmed working)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily added prod_fixed_scope_dev to localStorage cart for scope section UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bugs from iteration 88 are fixed and working: (1) GoCardless idempotency in /app/backend/routes/gocardless.py lines 57-81, (2) Scope ID cart section (cart-scope-id-section, cart-scope-id-input, cart-scope-id-validate-btn) renders when scope items in cart, (3) Customer edit dialog max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto at data-testid=admin-customer-edit-dialog, (4) User edit dialog max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto at data-testid=admin-edit-user-dialog, (5) Terms dialogs max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto at data-testid=admin-terms-dialog and admin-terms-edit-dialog. Platform admin login: partner_code='automate-accounts'. Note: testcustomer@test.com login NOT working via /api/auth/customer-login (404 - endpoint not found). The correct endpoint may be /api/auth/partner-login. Admin login key field is 'token' not 'access_token'.

rca_of_issues.gocardless_false_error: RCA: Backend was re-processing already-completed GC redirect flows on page refresh, causing payment creation to fail again. Fix: Added idempotency check at top of complete_gocardless_redirect - if order/subscription already has gocardless_payment_id, returns success immediately.
rca_of_issues.dialog_size: RCA: Edit dialogs had no max-height constraint, so long-content dialogs overflowed viewport. Fix: Added max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto to DialogContent className.
rca_of_issues.scope_id_flow: RCA: Previously non-BUILD-FIXED-SCOPE scope_request products opened modal too. Fix: handleScopeRequest now only shows modal for BUILD-FIXED-SCOPE sku, other scope_request products add to cart and navigate to /cart. Cart now has Scope ID input section in the scope area.
